what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line chart icon with stroked axes and a zigzag data line using the current text color.
observations: Uses an inline SVG root with xmlns and viewBox="0 0 24 24".
Sets fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" for themeable outline rendering.
Uses stroke-width="1.5" with round line caps and joins.
Contains two path elements: one for horizontal and vertical axes, and one for a connected line series.
standouts: Round stroke styling for icon-system consistency.
conventions: Uses path-only geometry without embedded styles or scripts.
concerns: No title or desc element is present, so accessible labeling would need to be supplied by the consumer.
notes: A compact reusable outline icon for representing chart or trend data.
questions: Should this SVG be treated as decorative by default or receive an accessible label from its consumer?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename/path imply a line chart icon, and the SVG draws axes with a line-series path.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, color-inheriting line chart glyph for an icon set or design system.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable SVG representation of chart/trend data using axes and a connected line path.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 themeable SVG line-chart icon composed of stroked axes and a zigzag data-line path.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable outline icon that visually denotes analytics, charts, or trend movement.
